description: calc() expressions: mixed percent-minus-length and percent-plus-length widths (resolved against the containing width at layout), a unitless multiply for a margin, a divide for padding, and calc() composed with var(). Default base-14 font so text stays searchable.
visual_assertions: The first box spans the content width minus 100pt.
The second box is half the content width plus 40pt.
The fourth box's text is indented 36pt (1in ÷ 2).
The last box is 220pt wide (var(--w) + 20pt) with 8pt padding from --pad.
